examples.description: The defaults a new datasource starts with: the single service 'Netlify' preselects its only auth method, bearer_token. Fill in the personal access token (secureJsonData "Netlify.token", empty here) to get a working datasource.

personalAccessToken.description: Authenticate against https://api.netlify.com/api/v1 with a Netlify personal access token provided as the write-only secret at secureJsonData "Netlify.token".
